case_title: YONGMEI LI VS. ANOLINX LLC,A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YONGMEI AS TO DEFENDANT ANOLINX LLC,A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YONGMEI AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
